# Gentle Monster Web3 E-Commerce Store

Gentle Monster is a luxury eyewear brand featuring sunglasses, optical glasses, and Web3 cryptocurrency payment integrations.

## Core Navigation & Features

- [Home Page](https://gentlemonstercl.vercel.app/)
- [Sunglasses Collection](https://gentlemonstercl.vercel.app/sunglasses)
- [Optical Glasses Collection](https://gentlemonstercl.vercel.app/glasses)
- [Intelligent Eyewear](https://gentlemonstercl.vercel.app/intelligent-eyewear)
- [Stories & Campaigns](https://gentlemonstercl.vercel.app/stories)
- [User Account Dashboard](https://gentlemonstercl.vercel.app/account)
- [Admin Management Panel](https://gentlemonstercl.vercel.app/admin)

## Technology Architecture

- Frontend: React 19, Tailwind CSS 4.0, SwiperJS
- Web3 Payments: MetaMask RPC Integration, Privy Embedded Wallets, Ganache/Sepolia Testnet
- Data Layer: MongoDB Atlas Cloud API with Client LocalStorage Fault-Tolerant Fallback
